seoTitle: How to Use TurboTax Free: A Simple Walkthrough
metaDescription: Filing on a budget? Here's how to set up and use TurboTax Free, from account setup to submitting your return without extra fees.
intro: Not everyone needs the paid tiers of TurboTax, and the free version can cover a lot of ground for students, freelancers, and first-time filers. This walkthrough covers setting up your TurboTax Free account, entering your income, and getting your return submitted without paying for features you don't need.

steps.heading: Set up your TurboTax Free account
steps.body: Create your account correctly from the start, since this determines which forms and features are available to you at no cost.

steps.heading: Get comfortable with the interface
steps.body: Take a moment to explore the TurboTax Free layout before diving into data entry, so the process feels less unfamiliar.

steps.heading: Input your income and deductions
steps.body: Enter your income sources and any deductions you're eligible for, following TurboTax's guided prompts step by step.

steps.heading: Watch for common filing issues
steps.body: Keep an eye out for typical mistakes that can slow down or complicate your filing, and address them as they come up.

steps.heading: Review and submit
steps.body: Double-check your entries before submitting your completed return through TurboTax Free.

faq.question: Who is TurboTax Free actually meant for?
faq.answer: It's aimed at students, freelancers, small business owners, and anyone navigating tax season for the first time who wants to avoid paying for features they don't need.

faq.question: Can TurboTax Free handle multiple income sources?
faq.answer: The tutorial covers inputting various income sources, so it can handle more than a single W-2, though more complex situations may require a paid tier.

faq.question: What if I run into an issue while filing with TurboTax Free?
faq.answer: TurboTax highlights common filing issues as you go, and troubleshooting them promptly helps keep your filing on track.

faq.question: Does TurboTax Free help me find deductions and credits?
faq.answer: Yes, part of using TurboTax Free effectively is following its prompts for deductions and credits so you don't leave money on the table.
